retrieved_result: Q: how to Enable Logging for Performance Log Users Group Members for Vista Home Premium? AD Adalid87 asked on July 30, 2009 Q: how to Enable Logging for Performance Log Users Group Members for Vista Home Premium? hello i need to Enable Logging for Performance Log Users Group Members, i tryed excecuting secpol.msc but the system cant find it. Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about enabling logging for Windows Vista performance logs, which is unrelated to IDEs or software development tools. It does not address the query about top IDEs.
